Name

MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3

Code

MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3

DBMS

Snowflake


Check constraint name of the table MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3

CKT_MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIAN


Server validation rule of the table MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3

%RULES%


Code preview of the table MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3

drop table MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3 cascade;

--==============================================================
-- Table: MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3
--==============================================================
create or replace table MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3 (
MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_KEY TEXT_255_ not null,
MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_KEY TEXT_255_,
COUNTRY_CODE_BK TEXT_255_ not null,
VARIANT_ACTUAL_CONTENT_UNIT DECIMAL,
VARIANT_APPROVAL_STATUS_CODE TEXT_255_,
VARIANT_BRAND_CODE TEXT_255_,
VARIANT_BRAND_DESCRIPTION TEXT_255_,
VARIANT_BRAND_FAMILY_NAME TEXT_255_,
VARIANT_EXTERNAL_BRAND_CODE TEXT_255_,
VARIANT_CODE_BK TEXT_255_ not null,
VARIANT_COLOR_CODE TEXT_255_,
VARIANT_COLOR_GROUP_CODE TEXT_255_,
VARIANT_COLOR_GROUP_HEX_CODE TEXT_255_,
VARIANT_COLOR_GROUP_NAME TEXT_255_,
VARIANT_COLOR_DESCRIPTION TEXT_255_,
VARIANT_COLOR_HEX_CODE TEXT_255_,
VARIANT_COMING_SOON_FLAG BOOLEAN,
VARIANT_DEFAULT_CATEGORY_CODE TEXT_255_,
VARIANT_DEFAULT_CATEGORY_DESCRIPTION TEXT_255_,
VARIANT_DEFAULT_CATEGORY_EXTERNAL_CODE TEXT_255_,
VARIANT_DESCRIPTION TEXT_255_,
VARIANT_DEVICE_VERSION TEXT_255_,
VARIANT_EAN TEXT_255_,
VARIANT_EDITION TEXT_255_,
VARIANT_FLAVOUR TEXT_255_,
VARIANT_PRODUCT_SHIPPABLE_FLAG BOOLEAN,
VARIANT_REDEMPTION_ELIGIBLE_FLAG BOOLEAN,
VARIANT_REVIEWABLE_FLAG BOOLEAN,
VARIANT_REWARD_ELIGIBLE_FLAG BOOLEAN,
VARIANT_SOLD_INDIVIDUALLY_FLAG BOOLEAN,
VARIANT_HARD_AGE_VERIFICATION_VISIBILITY_FLAG BOOLEAN,
VARIANT_MAX_ORDER_QUANTITY INTEGER,
VARIANT_MIN_ORDER_QUANTITY INTEGER,
VARIANT_MODEL TEXT_255_,
VARIANT_NAME TEXT_255_,
VARIANT_NICOTINE_LEVEL TEXT_255_,
VARIANT_NUMBER_CONTENT_UNIT DECIMAL,
VARIANT_OFFLINE_DATE DATETIME,
VARIANT_ONLINE_DATE DATETIME,
VARIANT_PLATFORM TEXT_255_,
VARIANT_PMI_PRODUCT_CATEGORY TEXT_255_,
VARIANT_PMI_PRODUCT_CODE TEXT_255_,
VARIANT_PMI_SELLABLE_PRODUCT_CODE TEXT_255_,
VARIANT_PRE_ORDER_END_DATE DATETIME,
VARIANT_PRICE_QUANTITY DECIMAL,
VARIANT_PRODUCT_DETAIL TEXT_255_,
VARIANT_PRODUCT_URL TEXT_255_,
VARIANT_PUFF TEXT_255_,
VARIANT_REDEMPTION_POINT DECIMAL,
VARIANT_SEO_DESCRIPTION TEXT_255_,
VARIANT_SEO_TITLE TEXT_255_,
VARIANT_SEO_URL TEXT_255_,
VARIANT_SHORT_DESCRIPTION TEXT_255_,
VARIANT_STATUS_POINT DECIMAL,
VARIANT_SUBJECTED_TO_REGISTRATION_FLAG BOOLEAN,
VARIANT_TANK_SIZE TEXT_255_,
VARIANT_TECHNICAL_DETAIL TEXT_255_,
VARIANT_TYPE TEXT_255_,
VARIANT_UNIT_CODE TEXT_255_,
VARIANT_UNIT_DESCRIPTION TEXT_255_,
VARIANT_VEEV_TANK_SIZE TEXT_255_,
VARIANT_WARRANTY_INFORMATION TEXT_255_,
VALID_FROM DATETIME not null,
VALID_TO DATETIME not null,
ACTIVE_FLAG FLAG not null,
constraint PK_MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT primary key (MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_KEY)
not enforced
);

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3.MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_KEY is
'PK for MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3.MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_KEY is
'FK to MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3.COUNTRY_CODE_BK is
'Country where the product is available (events_country_code )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3.VARIANT_ACTUAL_CONTENT_UNIT is
'Nominal content per sales unit for variant product (events_products_variants_actualContentUnits )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3.VARIANT_APPROVAL_STATUS_CODE is
'Status code of the variant approval (events_products_variants_approvalStatusCode )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3.VARIANT_BRAND_CODE is
'Code of the product variant that the product identification, typically a barcode, is linked to. (events_products_variants_brand_brandCode )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3.VARIANT_BRAND_DESCRIPTION is
'Brand description of the product variant (events_products_variants_brand_brandDescriptions_en )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3.VARIANT_BRAND_FAMILY_NAME is
'Brand family of the product variant (events_products_variants_brand_brandFamilyName )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3.VARIANT_EXTERNAL_BRAND_CODE is
'Brand code for variant product (external) (events_products_variants_brand_externalBrandCode )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3.VARIANT_CODE_BK is
'Code of the variant product (events_products_variants_code )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3.VARIANT_COLOR_CODE is
'Short code of the color for the product variant (events_products_variants_color_code )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3.VARIANT_COLOR_GROUP_CODE is
'Unique code for variant product color group (events_products_variants_color_colorGroupData_code )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3.VARIANT_COLOR_GROUP_HEX_CODE is
'Color group hexadecimal code of the variant product (events_products_variants_color_colorGroupData_hexCode )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3.VARIANT_COLOR_GROUP_NAME is
'Color group name in English for the variant product (extended value) (events_products_variants_color_colorGroupData_name_en )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3.VARIANT_COLOR_DESCRIPTION is
'Description of the variant product color in english (events_products_variants_color_description_en )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3.VARIANT_COLOR_HEX_CODE is
'Color Hexcode variant (events_products_variants_color_hexCode )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3.VARIANT_COMING_SOON_FLAG is
'Indicator that shows if variant product is coming soon (events_products_variants_comingSoon )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3.VARIANT_DEFAULT_CATEGORY_CODE is
'Default category that the variant product belongs to (events_products_variants_defaultCategory_code )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3.VARIANT_DEFAULT_CATEGORY_DESCRIPTION is
'Default category description of the variant product (events_products_variants_defaultCategory_description_en )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3.VARIANT_DEFAULT_CATEGORY_EXTERNAL_CODE is
'Default category that the variant product belongs to (external) (events_products_variants_defaultCategory_externalCode )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3.VARIANT_DESCRIPTION is
'Description of the variant product in English (events_products_variants_description_en )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3.VARIANT_DEVICE_VERSION is
'Version of the product bought by consumers. From Product Catalog. (events_products_variants_deviceVersion )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3.VARIANT_EAN is
'EAN code (events_products_variants_ean )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3.VARIANT_EDITION is
'Specific edition of the product variant (events_products_variants_edition_en )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3.VARIANT_FLAVOUR is
'Flavour of the variant product (events_products_variants_flavour_en )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3.VARIANT_PRODUCT_SHIPPABLE_FLAG is
'Indicator that shows if variant product is ready to be shipped (events_products_variants_isProductShippable )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3.VARIANT_REDEMPTION_ELIGIBLE_FLAG is
'It identifies if a product is eligible for redemption for variant product (events_products_variants_isRedemptionEligible )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3.VARIANT_REVIEWABLE_FLAG is
'Indicator that shows if variant product is ready to be reviewed (events_products_variants_isReviewable )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3.VARIANT_REWARD_ELIGIBLE_FLAG is
'It identifies if a product is eligible for Reward for variant product (events_products_variants_isRewardEligible )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3.VARIANT_SOLD_INDIVIDUALLY_FLAG is
'Indicator that shows if variant product can be sold separately (events_products_variants_isSoldIndividually )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3.VARIANT_HARD_AGE_VERIFICATION_VISIBILITY_FLAG is
'Indicator that shows if variant product is visible only after hard age verification is done (events_products_variants_isVisibleOnlyAfterHAV )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3.VARIANT_MAX_ORDER_QUANTITY is
'Maximum number of variant products that can be purchased in a single order (events_products_variants_maxOrderQuantity )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3.VARIANT_MIN_ORDER_QUANTITY is
'Minimum number of variant products that can be purchased in a single order (events_products_variants_minOrderQuantity )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3.VARIANT_MODEL is
'Model of the variant (events_products_variants_model )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3.VARIANT_NAME is
'Extended name of the variant product in English (events_products_variants_name_en )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3.VARIANT_NICOTINE_LEVEL is
'Nicotine level of the variant product (events_products_variants_nicotineLevel_en )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3.VARIANT_NUMBER_CONTENT_UNIT is
'Nominal content per sales unit for variant product (events_products_variants_numberContentUnits )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3.VARIANT_OFFLINE_DATE is
'Date when variant product is decommissioned (events_products_variants_offlineDate )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3.VARIANT_ONLINE_DATE is
'Date when variant product is active for sale (events_products_variants_onlineDate )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3.VARIANT_PLATFORM is
'product platform (events_products_variants_platform )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3.VARIANT_PMI_PRODUCT_CATEGORY is
'Variant product category code  (events_products_variants_pmiProductCategory )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3.VARIANT_PMI_PRODUCT_CODE is
'PMI internal product code. (events_products_variants_pmiProductCode )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3.VARIANT_PMI_SELLABLE_PRODUCT_CODE is
'Sellable code for variant product (events_products_variants_pmiSellableProductCode )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3.VARIANT_PRE_ORDER_END_DATE is
'Date until when product variant that can be pre-ordered (events_products_variants_preOrderDateUntil )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3.VARIANT_PRICE_QUANTITY is
'Number of product variants that can be sold (events_products_variants_priceQuantity )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3.VARIANT_PRODUCT_DETAIL is
'Details about the product variant in English (events_products_variants_productDetails_en )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3.VARIANT_PRODUCT_URL is
'Link for the product variant info on PMI website (events_products_variants_productUrl )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3.VARIANT_PUFF is
'Number of puffs (events_products_variants_puffs_en )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3.VARIANT_REDEMPTION_POINT is
'Loyalty points that are used to reward the consumer based on her actions. These points can be used as discount while purchasing device or accessories. (events_products_variants_redemptionPoints )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3.VARIANT_SEO_DESCRIPTION is
'Description of the product variant in English that is shown in search engines (events_products_variants_seoDescription_en )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3.VARIANT_SEO_TITLE is
'Title of the product variant description in English that is shown in search engines (events_products_variants_seoTitle_en )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3.VARIANT_SEO_URL is
'Variant product url for SEO (events_products_variants_seoURL_en )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3.VARIANT_SHORT_DESCRIPTION is
'Short description of the variant product in English (events_products_variants_shortDescription_en )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3.VARIANT_STATUS_POINT is
'Status Points earned or deducted for activity (events_products_variants_statusPoints )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3.VARIANT_SUBJECTED_TO_REGISTRATION_FLAG is
'Indicator that shows if product variant is subject for registration (events_products_variants_subjectedToRegistration )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3.VARIANT_TANK_SIZE is
'Variant tank size of the device (events_products_variants_tankSize )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3.VARIANT_TECHNICAL_DETAIL is
'Technical details of the product variant in English (events_products_variants_technicalDetails_en )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3.VARIANT_TYPE is
'Type of variant product (events_products_variants_type )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3.VARIANT_UNIT_CODE is
'Sales product unit of measurement (events_products_variants_unit_code )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3.VARIANT_UNIT_DESCRIPTION is
'Sales unit description for the variant product (events_products_variants_unit_description_en )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3.VARIANT_VEEV_TANK_SIZE is
'Tank size of the variant Veev (events_products_variants_veevTankSize_en )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3.VARIANT_WARRANTY_INFORMATION is
'Information about warranty for variant product (events_products_variants_warrantyInformation_en )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3.VALID_FROM is
'It indicates from when the record is active (VALID_FROM: Indicates the dattime when the validity of the record starts. As it is SCD Type 2 it''s derived from the __LOAD_TS. )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3.VALID_TO is
'It indicates till when the record is Active (VALID_TO: Indicates the dattime till when the record is/was valid. As it is SCD Type 2 it''s derived from the __LOAD_TS. In case record is still valid it should contain date 9999-12-31)';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3.ACTIVE_FLAG is
' It indicates if the record is active (ACTIVE_FLAG: Active Indicator. True value only for only the most recent record. All others being updated as False.)';
